subject: Re: Error importing in M
body:
Hi Ricardo,

When you try to import, do you find the ring showing the tomogram
filter/selection distribution is blue like below? If so, you will need to
tick "Include items outside of filter ranges". I often find that all
tomograms from most datasets are inexplicably filtered out by default in M
despite being within the filter ranges on Warp.

Cheers,

Mat

[image: Screenshot from 2023-06-16 16-41-24.png]


On Fri, 16 Jun 2023 at 15:57, Ricardo Righetto <ricardorighetto@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Hi, I am getting the "No micrographs or tilt series found to match these
> settings" when adding a data source (.settings file) in M:
>
> [image: image.png]
> The tilt series was imported and processed without issues in Warp, after
> which I exported subtomos and refined in RELION. Now I want to further
> refine in M and am encountering this error. I compared with another
> .settings file that works in M and could not find any obvious problem.
>
> Any ideas what's going on here?
>
> Thanks a lot!
>
> --
> Ricardo Diogo Righetto
>
